variables.notes: Selected the only dedicated R&D expense label present. Although supplemental/empty in preview, the instructions say presence of the row implies it has a value in at least one year and semantically it is the correct XRD target.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and other finance costs

variables.notes: Priority list ordered from most direct reported interest expense line to broader fallbacks. Excluded 'Other Financial Expenses / Income' because it is too broad/mixed.

variables.notes: Using explicit shareholders' equity first, with 'Net assets Equity' as fallback. Avoided balancing rows.
